spec.name: Stanneg Inn
spec.description: This is a plainly decorated room, the main room of the Stanneg Inn. A large arch to the west leads to a common room where food and drink can be ordered, and a set of rickety wooden stairs lead up to the rooms are. A thread- bare rug lies in the middle of the floor, evidently well- loved by a cat or two from the quantity of hair on it.

south.description: There is a large set of double doors, made of wood set into the wall.
